name: SCC_ChargingStatusRes
title: SCC_ChargingStatusRes
syntax: void SCC_ChargingStatusRes ( byte SessionID[], long ResponseCode, char EVSEID[], long SAScheduleTupleID, long ReceiptRequired )
description: The callback is called as soon as a Charging Status Response is received.
Further details that are transmitted in this request can be queried with

parameters.name: SessionID
parameters.description: 8-byte long SessionID of SCC connection, range: 0 – 0xFF FF FF FF FF FF FF FF.
